user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Alpine Ski House. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 17:05 EST
Subject: Follow-up: migration architecture Review

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our COO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-21 08:40 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Alpine Ski House

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our COO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-14 08:01 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with migration architecture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: migration architecture Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-02-14
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft), Priya (Alpine Ski House)

[00:01:15] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is migration architecture.

[00:08:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:13:00] Priya (Alpine Ski House): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:20:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:24:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): On the migration architecture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:29:00] Priya (Alpine Ski House): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:31:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:36:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): The timeline for timeline constraints is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:38:00] Priya (Alpine Ski House): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:41:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.
